title: Doctor Strange/Zombie Outbreak
content:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:Doctor Strange {{!}} Zombie Outbreak}} {{Otheruses|Doctor Strange}} {{CharHub|Doctor Strange|Stephen Strange}} {{AltUniverse|the "[[Zombie Outbreak Universe]]"|3=Characters|4=1}} {{Character |name = Doctor Strange |image = Doc Strange Zombie infobox.png |real name = {{ConjecNameAU|Stephen Vincent}} StrangeThis character's given and middle names are derived from a Variant [[:File:Doctor Strange Bone & Muscle Scan.jpg|Stephen Strange's Surgery Files]] and thus is conjecturally treated as the same.{{Ref|WI105AD}} |alias = {{Alias |codenames = Doctor Strange{{Ref|WI105AD}}}} |species = [[Zombies|Zombified]] [[Human]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|USA}} |gender = Male |DOD = [[2018/Zombie Outbreak|Spring 2018]]{{Ref|WI105}} |title = Doctor
Master of the [[New York Sanctum]] |affiliation = {{Affiliation|MMAZO}} |tv series = ''[[What If...?]]''
*''[[What If... Zombies?!]]'' |voice actor = |status = Deceased}} Doctor '''{{ConjecNameAU|Stephen Vincent}} Strange''', M.D., Ph.D., was a [[Masters of the Mystic Arts/Zombie Outbreak|Master of the Mystic Arts]] and the master of the [[New York Sanctum]]. He was infected with the [[Quantum Virus]] in [[2018/Zombie Outbreak|2018]] and was killed by [[Wasp/Zombie Outbreak|Wasp]]'s [[ants]] after making an attempt to devour [[Hulk/Zombie Outbreak|Bruce Banner]]. ==Biography== {{MD|Stephen Strange (Earth-89521)}} ===Zombie Apocalypse=== ====Overwhelmed by the Undead==== In [[2018/Zombie Outbreak|2018]], the [[Quantum Virus]] broke out across the [[United States of America]]. Strange, along with [[Wong/Zombie Outbreak|Wong]], became infected by the virus and transformed into [[Zombies|zombies]]. Due to this, the [[Cloak of Levitation]] abandoned Strange and the [[New York Sanctum]] was left unoccupied.{{Ref|WI105}} ====Attacking Bruce Banner==== [[File:Strange and Wong - Zombies.png|{{AltFloat}}|Zombified Strange and [[Wong/Zombie Outbreak|Wong]]]] Two weeks later, Strange, [[Wong/Zombie Outbreak|Wong]], and [[Iron Man/Zombie Outbreak|Tony Stark]] attacked and infected [[Ebony Maw/Zombie Outbreak|Ebony Maw]] and [[Cull Obsidian/Zombie Outbreak|Cull Obsidian]], two members of the [[Black Order/Zombie Outbreak|Black Order]]. They then attacked [[Hulk/Zombie Outbreak|Bruce Banner]], who had just returned to [[Earth]]. However, the [[Cloak of Levitation]] came to Banner's rescue and restrained Strange from using his [[Sling Ring]] and killed Wong. When Maw neutralized the Cloak and suspended Banner, a horde of [[Ants|ants]] commanded by [[Wasp/Zombie Outbreak|Hope van Dyne]] arrived, devouring the flesh off Strange and the Black Order zombies.{{Ref|WI105}} {{Clear}} ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== *'''Zombie Physiology''': Doctor Strange was infected with an [[Quantum Virus|encephalopathic virus]] that overloaded his brain's limbic system, turning him into a [[Zombies|zombie]]. **'''Infection''': Like any zombies, Strange is capable of spreading encephalopathic virus to others by biting or scratching which would turn them into zombies. *'''[[Magic]]''': Strange was one of the most powerful members of the Masters of the Mystic Arts, possessing an extremely high level of mastery over magic, even in the zombie form. **'''[[Magic#Eldritch Magic 2|Eldritch Magic]]''': Strange was able to shape and manipulate Eldritch Magic, forming tangible constructs of energy, such as weapons or shields, as well as cast spells by writing specific formations with the fiery energy. ***'''Spell Casting''': Strange was able to use an [[Eldritch Whip]] to bind [[Ebony Maw/Zombie Outbreak|Ebony Maw]]. ***'''Portal Creation''': Strange was able to open [[Inter-Dimensional Portal]]s without the need of a [[Sling Ring]]. ===Abilities=== {{Expand}} *'''Genius-Level Intellect''': Strange achieved his MD and Ph.D. simultaneously at medical school, going on to become one of the world's most renowned neurosurgeons, and later proving himself equally prodigious in the study of mystic arts. *'''Expert Martial Artist''': ''To be added'' ==Equipment== ===Other Equipment=== *'''[[Eye of Agamotto]]''': Strange wore the Eye of Agamotto while attacking [[Hulk/Zombie Outbreak|Bruce Banner]] as a [[Zombies|zombie]]. ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Allies=== *[[Zombies]] - Former Enemies **[[Wong/Zombie Outbreak|Wong]] † - Friend **[[Iron Man/Zombie Outbreak|Tony Stark/Iron Man]] † **[[Ebony Maw/Zombie Outbreak|Ebony Maw]] † **[[Cull Obsidian/Zombie Outbreak|Cull Obsidian]] † {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Zombie Outbreak Survivor Group]] **[[Wasp/Zombie Outbreak|Hope van Dyne/Wasp]] **[[Hulk/Zombie Outbreak|Bruce Banner/Hulk]] *[[Ants]] - Killers {{Col-end}} ==Trivia== *Doctor Strange's likeness is based off of [[Benedict Cumberbatch]]. ==Gallery== Strange and Wong - Zombies.png Five Zombies.png Obsidian and Strange zombies.png Zombie Strange getting eaten by Van Dyne's Ants.png Zombie Doctor Strange Poster -
